questions.q: Why are some B.C. residents demanding changes to the AMBER Alert system following an overnight alert in May 2026?
options: It does not provide enough details about the suspects.
It broadcasts province-wide, waking people far from the incident.
It is not available in languages other than English.
It only alerts major cities and ignores rural areas.
It causes cell phones to permanently freeze until restarted.
It sends notifications as text messages instead of alarms.
questions.correctText: It broadcasts province-wide, waking people far from the incident.

questions.q: Scientists warned Canadians in May 2026 to prepare for an invasion of the lone star tick from the U.S., which is known to cause what severe condition?
According to University of Toronto researchers examining cellphone data in May 2026, what was the median decline in Canadian visits to major U.S. metropolitan areas?
Data from the Office of the Superintendent of Bankruptcy in May 2026 revealed that Canadian consumer insolvencies reached their highest level since what year?
Which group's leader recently refused to co-operate with Elections Alberta investigators over the alleged misuse of the provincial electors list?
